title: BUbreakingHeadlines

items.title: Ukraine and Russia ravaged by 4 years of full-scale war without an ending in sight

items.title: WATCH:  Massive fire triggers bridge collapse in Lincoln, Nebraska
items.description: The bridge is primarily used for freight trains. No word on the cause of the blaze.

items.title: Russell Brand due in court on further rape, sexual assault charges
items.description: Russell Brand is due in court on rape and sexual assault charges, which were issued to him in December 2025.

items.title: Power outages reported, thousands of flights canceled as storm slams Northeast
items.description: More than 40 million people were under blizzard warnings along 700 miles of the East Coast from Maryland to Maine.
